message:
🌱 Add oauth2-proxy: Support for Microsoft Identity platform with Azure provider mission (#953)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "oauth2-proxy-1231-support-for-microsoft-identity-platform-with-azure-provider",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "oauth2-proxy: Support for Microsoft Identity platform with Azure provider",
+    "description": "Support for Microsoft Identity platform with Azure provider. Requested by 38+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current oauth2-proxy deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your oauth2-proxy version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n oauth2-proxy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oauth2-proxy\nhelm list -n oauth2-proxy 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working oauth2-proxy installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review oauth2-proxy configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant oauth2-proxy configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n oauth2-proxy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oauth2-proxy\nkubectl get configmap -n oauth2-proxy -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=oauth2-proxy\n```\nAt the moment the Azure provider supports only Azure Active Directory (v1.0) endpoints.\nVersion v1.0 is deprecated by Microsoft and not fully compliant with the OIDC protocol."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support for Microsoft Identity platform with Azure provider",
+        "description": "I tried your way to configure\n```yaml\nAADSTS901002: The 'resource' request parameter is not supported.\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n oauth2-proxy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oauth2-proxy\nkubectl get events -n oauth2-proxy --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support for Microsoft Identity platform with Azure provider\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "See the source issue for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy/issues/1231",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "AADSTS901002: The 'resource' request parameter is not supported.",
+        "provider: azure\nazure-tenant: [REDACTED]\noidc-issuer-url: https://login.microsoftonline.com/[REDACTED]/v2.0\nresource: 6dae42f8-4368-4678-94ff-3960e28e3630\nset-xauthrequest: \"true\"",
+        "Server Version: version.Info{Major:\"1\", Minor:\"20\", GitVersion:\"v1.20.5\", GitCommit:\"9a45ba1752db920873e084791faff8d470278b09\", GitTreeState:\"clean\", BuildDate:\"2021-05-19T22:28:02Z\", GoVersion:\"go1.15.8\", Compiler:\"gc\", Platform:\"linux/amd64\"}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "oauth2-proxy",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "oauth2-proxy"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy/issues/1231",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy"
+    },
+    "reactions": 38,
+    "comments": 57,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with oauth2-proxy installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-13T06:39:10.830Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
